creative_brief: Split image: Rachel with cattle in green pastures on left, fresh beef cuts at Brookvale hub on right. Clean, honest photography showing the short journey.
primary_text: Last Tuesday Rachel from Kempsey told us her cattle travel just 180km to reach Sydney families. Compare that to supermarket beef averaging 2,400km. No wholesalers. No cold storage for weeks. Rachel's regenerative pastures produce beef that reaches our Brookvale hub within days. Order when you want. Collect Monday to Friday. We're raising capital to expand across Sydney. VIP access starts at a $5 refundable deposit.
headline: Rachel's beef travels 180km, not 2,400km
description: Farm-direct groceries via Brookvale hub. Equity crowdfunding now open. Not financial advice.
